title: Models, Interactions API, Capabilities, Stability, and Provider Ports · Behavior Case: Provider Adapter
summary: The code hard-codes a preview model, assumes every endpoint supports tools and schemas, mixes legacy generateContent examples with Interactions state, and has no migration seam. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the provider adapter increment in verified model capability and provider-adapter record. Learners progress through predictio…
objectives: Define a narrow typed provider interface that preserves provider-specific steps and usage while keeping orchestration testable and replaceable.
Choose system instruction, temperature, thinking level, output limits, safety configuration, and tools from task evidence and re-declare per interaction.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-provider-adapter — Define a narrow typed provider interface that preserves provider-specific steps and usage while keeping orchestration testable and replaceable.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-model-api-capabilities-5
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-model-api-capabilities-5.
# Case 9036: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def worked_agentpy_model_api_capabilities_5(required_capabilities: int = 7, verified_capabilities: int = 7, stable_features: int = 5, preview_features: int = 2, undocumented_assumptions: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "authorityworked5",
        "interaction9036",
        "tool5dekrow",
        "stateworked59036",
        "evaluation9036worked5",
        "recovery5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if required_capabilities < 1 or verified_capabilities < 0:
        return False, verified_capabilities, "capability-shape"
    if verified_capabilities != required_capabilities:
        return False, verified_capabilities, "capability-gap"
    if stable_features < 1 or preview_features < 0:
        return False, stable_features, "stability-boundary"
    if undocumented_assumptions > 0:
        return False, undocumented_assumptions, "undocumented-assumption"
    assert verified_capabilities == required_capabilities and undocumented_assumptions == 0
    return True, verified_capabilities, "verified-model-surface"

steps.instruction:

    assert evidence_variant_1c7yn4
    evidence_axes_1c7yn4 = (
        "authority1c7yn4",
        "interaction7119",
        "tool4ny7c1",
        "state1c7yn47119",

        "recovery4ny7c17119",

    if required_capabilities < 1 or verified_capabilities < 0:

    if verified_capabilities != required_capabilities:
        return False, verified_capabilities, "capability-gap"
    if stable_features < 1 or preview_features < 0:
        return False, stable_features, "stability-boundary"
    if undocumented_assumptions > 0:
        return False, undocumented_assumptions, "undocumented-assumption"
    assert verified_capabilities == required_capabilities and undocumented_assumptions == 0
    return True, verified_capabilities, "verified-model-surface"

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Provider Adapter structural check is only one gate. verified model capability and provider-adapter record must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.
